extName.message: BlazCaptcha: Free and Lightweight Image Captcha Solver

extDescription.message: Auto-detect and solve image CAPTCHAs instantly with local OCR. 3 ways to use: click the button next to CAPTCHA, right-click any image, or paste an image into the popup. No server, no API key, no signup — 100% free and privacy-friendly.

dropZoneHint.message: Drag & drop or paste an image

clickToFillHint.message: Copied! Click any input field to fill, or press Esc to cancel
